title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
original_title: ज़रा हट के ज़रा बच के
overview: Kapil and Somya fall in love, get married and are happily living in a joint family. However, soon the love fades away and the couple is on the verge of a divorce, but not a real one as a twist awaits the two families.
